subcodes.first_line: O distinguished one! The Lord of the worlds maketh mention of thee from His Most Great Prison with that which shall strengthen thee in that which endureth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محتشم یذکرک مولی العالم من شطر سجنه الاعظم بما یویدک علی ما یبقی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
